_publications._publicationTitle: Therapeutic Vulnerability to ATR Inhibition in Concurrent

_contextSnippet: Similarly, ATRX knockdown and TERC KO in the MPNST cell line NF90-8 successfully suppressed telomerase activity...and sensitized cells to ATR inhibition (AZD6738 and VE-822)
details: ATRX knockdown and TERC KO sensitized cells to ATR inhibition (AZD6738 and VE-822)
